title: Installing an App
drDigitalIntro:
Installing an app puts it on your device.
• For free apps, just tap Install.
• Paid apps charge your payment method on file.
• Once installed, the app appears in your app list.

steps.say: Search for 'Puzzle Quest' in the search bar.
Click on Puzzle Quest from the results.
Click Install to download and install it.
Click 'My Apps' in the tab bar to see your installed apps.

drDigitalSuccess: You installed an app! Free apps install instantly. Check My Apps to see everything you've installed.
drDigitalHint: Search for an app, click its name, then click the Install button.
